args.text: Guard fix confirmed live: billing-api running v3.4.1 with double_charge_guard=true.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
args.body: Hi Amara, we've issued a refund of $19.99 to your account for the duplicate billing charge on order ORD-5501. We apologise for the inconvenience.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
args.body: Hi Jonas, we've issued a refund of $19.99 to your account for the duplicate billing charge on order ORD-5502. We apologise for the inconvenience.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
args.body: Hi Priya, we've issued a refund of $39.98 to your account for the duplicate billing charge on order ORD-5503. We apologise for the inconvenience.

args.subject: Billing incident TCK-2201: refunds summary
args.body: All three affected orders have been refunded and customers notified. ORD-5501: $19.99, ORD-5502: $19.99, ORD-5503: $39.98. Total: $79.96. Root cause (disabled double_charge_guard) fixed and billing-api v3.4.1 deployed. Full details in refunds-summary.md.
